推荐场景: 手机天气新闻｜判断天气影响
60秒任务: 「天气新闻」：公告主旨/影响判断；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 公告｜通知｜原因｜时间地点｜简短说明｜主旨理解
场景族: 新闻短片｜播客访谈｜公共广播｜活动现场｜屏幕公告
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Today’s weather report says ___.（转述天气）
There will be heavy rain in the afternoon.（说明天气变化）
The temperature will drop by ___.（说明温度变化）
People should avoid unnecessary travel.（提出建议）
Because of strong winds, some services may be delayed.（说明原因结果）
Take an umbrella if you go out.（行动建议）
The warning is for the coastal area.（说明范围）
It should clear up by evening.（说明转好时间）
Did they say when the rain will stop?（询问细节）
I’m not sure, but they mentioned ___.（不确定转述）
We may need to change our plan.（调整计划）
Let’s leave earlier to avoid the storm.（提出行动）
The main risk is ___.（总结风险）
If it gets worse, we’ll stay home.（条件决定）
Good idea. Safety comes first.（达成一致）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: weather report, heavy rain, strong wind, temperature, warning, storm, coastal area
Verbs: drop, clear up, avoid, delay, mention, change
Adjectives / Adverbs: heavy, strong, cold, unsafe
Time / Place: afternoon, evening, coastal area, outside
Chunks: weather warning, heavy rain, strong winds, avoid travel, change our plan
